x_snc_airop_check_definition.ai_justification: FSM KB articles enable Now Assist to suggest resolution steps to field agents based on work order type.
x_snc_airop_check_definition.remediation_guidance: Create KB articles covering top work order resolution procedures. Target: 20+ published active articles. Now Assist FSM uses KB content for AI-recommended resolution suggestions to field agents.

sys_update_version.name: x_snc_airop_check_definition_4ff81dc7cfd587108935fb251d851cbc
sys_update_version.payload:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?><record_update table="x_snc_airop_check_definition"><x_snc_airop_check_definition action="INSERT_OR_UPDATE"><ai_justification><![CDATA[FSM KB articles enable Now Assist to suggest resolution steps to field agents based on work order type.]]></ai_justification><check_name>FSM Knowledge Base Coverage</check_name><check_script><![CDATA[(function(checkDef, dateFilter) {
    var ga = new GlideAggregate('kb_knowledge');
    ga.addQuery('workflow_state', 'published');
    ga.addQuery('active', true);
    ga.addAggregate('COUNT');
    ga.query();
    var count = ga.next() ? parseInt(ga.getAggregate('COUNT')) : 0;

    var actualValue = count + ' published active KB articles';

    if (count >= 20) {
        return {
            status: 'ready',
            actualValue: actualValue,
            finding: count + ' published KB articles. Now Assist FSM can suggest AI-recommended resolution procedures from the knowledge base.'
        };
    } else if (count >= 5) {
        return {
            status: 'needs_attention',
            actualValue: actualValue,
            finding: 'Only ' + count + ' published KB articles (target: 20+). Now Assist FSM KB-based AI resolution suggestions will have limited coverage.'
        };
    } else {
        return {
            status: 'not_ready',
            actualValue: actualValue,
            finding: 'Only ' + count + ' published KB articles. Insufficient KB content for Now Assist FSM to provide meaningful AI-recommended resolution procedures.'
        };
    }
})]]></check_script><is_active>true</is_active><is_clone_sensitive>false</is_clone_sensitive><is_manual>false</is_manual><module>FIELD_SERVICE</module><number>CHK0000438</number><order>110</order><remediation_guidance>Create KB articles covering top work order resolution procedures. Target: 20+ published active articles. Now Assist FSM uses KB content for AI-recommended resolution suggestions to field agents.</remediation_guidance><sys_class_name>x_snc_airop_check_definition</sys_class_name><sys_created_by>admin</sys_created_by><sys_created_on>2026-06-10 06:41:19</sys_created_on><sys_id>4ff81dc7cfd587108935fb251d851cbc</sys_id><sys_mod_count>1</sys_mod_count><sys_name>FSM Knowledge Base Coverage</sys_name><sys_package display_value="ServiceNow AI Readiness Optimization Platform" source="x_snc_airop">73e2562fcf244b908935fb251d851c78</sys_package><sys_policy/><sys_scope display_value="ServiceNow AI Readiness Optimization Platform">73e2562fcf244b908935fb251d851c78</sys_scope><sys_update_name>x_snc_airop_check_definition_4ff81dc7cfd587108935fb251d851cbc</sys_update_name><sys_updated_by>admin</sys_updated_by><sys_updated_on>2026-06-10 06:54:01</sys_updated_on></x_snc_airop_check_definition></record_update>
